one_time_description: Treaty funds received in 2020 with no prior year comparative
economic_notes: Band holds partnership interests in limited partnerships, membership in three societies, and shareholdings in ten companies. Key investments include Coast Tsimshian Resources Limited Partnership, Lax Kw'alaams Fishing Enterprises Limited Partnership, Lax Kw'alaams Business Development LP, and others. Lax Kw'alaams Ferry Corporation holds a $1,000,000 letter of credit for the Aero Point facility.
notes: Interfund administration charges and offsetting revenue of $1,371,099 not eliminated for consolidation. Investments recorded using modified equity method. Lax Kw'alaams Business Development LP operates independently of Band control but is reported using modified equity method. Contingent liabilities include guarantor of Band member mortgages up to $622,024, $1,000,000 letter of credit for Aero Point facility, and $1,000,000 guarantee for Coast Tsimshian Fish Plant Ltd. revolving credit. Treaty funds of $3,856,838 appear as one-time revenue with no prior year comparative. BC Housing revenue of $2,555,688 also new in 2020 with no prior year amount.
